models.author: MiniMax
models.license: Apache-2.0 (model) / API access via Hugging Face Inference
models.description: MiniMax-M3 ("M3") -- a native multimodal model (~428B params, ~23B active, 1M context) served through the Hugging Face Inference router (OpenAI-compatible). Supports captioning, structured JSON, bounding boxes, keypoints, classification, VQA on images, plus per-frame detection and temporal event detection on video via frame sampling.
